channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Catching up with stars at Disney's Upfront
item.description: ABC News' Will Ganss interviews stars about their upcoming projects as Disney reveals its new lineup of shows, films, and events.

item.title: Iran updates: Senate again fails to pass war powers resolution
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Friends of Maggie Murdaugh seek to preserve her legacy
item.description: CBS News' Nikki Battiste speaks with two of Maggie Murdaugh's close friends for a "48 Hours" segment.

item.title: Netanyahu made secret visit to UAE to meet with country's president
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu recently made a secret trip to the United Arab Emirates, meeting with President Mohammed bin Zayed.
